---
title: "Graphing Using ggplot Part-3"
output: html_notebook
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}
# Load the mpg dataset
data('mpg')
mpgData = mpg

# Print the first five rows (or samples) in the data frame
head(mpgData, 5)
```

```{r}
# Plot a scatter plot of mileage w.r.t. displacement
ggplot(data = mpgData) + 
  geom_point(mapping = aes(x = displ, y = hwy))
```

```{r}
# Plot a bar chart w.r.t. number of cylinders
ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl))
```

```{r}
#  Which stat geom_bar uses by default?
?geom_bar
#count
```

```{r}
# Using a stat explicitly
ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  stat_count(mapping = aes(x = cyl))
```

```{r}
tempData = data.frame(table(mpgData$cyl))
colnames(tempData) = c('cyl', 'frequency')
tempData
```

```{r}
# Plot a bar chart w.r.t. number of cylinders directly
ggplot(data = tempData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, y = frequency), stat = 'identity')
```

```{r}
#  Plot a bar chart of proportion, rather than count w.r.t. number of cylinders
ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl))

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, y = ..prop..))
```

```{r}
# Plot a histogram of engine displacement
ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = displ, y = ..count..), binwidth = 0.5, color = 'black', fill = 'steelblue', alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = 'Displacement (litres)', y = 'Frequency')


ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = displ, y = ..count../sum(..count..)), binwidth = 0.5, color = 'black', fill = 'steelblue', alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = 'Displacement (litres)', y = 'Proportion')

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_histogram(aes(x = displ, y = ..density..), binwidth = 0.5, color = 'black', fill = 'steelblue', alpha = 0.4) +
  labs(x = 'Displacement (litres)', y = 'Relative Frequency')


```

```{r}
# Plot a bar chart w.r.t. number of cylinders and class using color and fill

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, fill = class))

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, fill = class), position = 'identity')

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, fill = class), position = 'identity', alpha =1/5)

ggplot(data = mpgData) +
  geom_bar(mapping = aes(x = cyl, fill = class), position = 'fill')

```
